canonical_summary: The ideas-lab project tracks Ameen's work as a Business Analytics Intern at IDeaS Revenue Solutions (IDeaS.Lab), organized in a sprint-based workspace with weekly folders spanning Week-01 (Feb 3) through at least Week-08 (Mar 24), originally located at ~/Desktop/IDeaS_Workspace/. An automated scheduled task called 'ideas-workspace-weekly-sync' was configured to scan and summarize weekly workspace activity, but has failed on every run since April 26, 2026 — the May 4 run produced a synthetic placeholder, the May 15 transcript was severely truncated, and the May 19 run could not locate the IDeaS_Workspace directory at all, indicating the workspace has moved or been removed from its expected Desktop location. A separate effort on May 25 cleaned up a GitHub repository called data-qualification-agent (under ahassan507) that had accumulated 360 health check report files in its commit history; the decision was made to replace it with a clean single-commit repo with no prior history and keep it private. The root cause of the sync failures — a broken directory path unresolved for over four weeks — remains the primary open blocker, and the immediate next steps are to manually locate the current IDeaS_Workspace directory, update the sync task's path configuration, and run a validation scan before the next scheduled execution.

known_solutions.problem: Need to determine which week folder each IDeaS_Lab file belongs to based on modification date
known_solutions.solution: IDeaS_Workspace contains Week-01_Feb-03 through at least Week-08_Mar-24 folders

known_solutions.problem: Conversation transcript is truncated — only the scheduled task invocation header and an empty synthetic response are visible
known_solutions.solution: No results determinable from the truncated transcript
IDeaS_Workspace not present at expected Desktop path

known_solutions.problem: 360chi health check report files had been pushed to a GitHub repo and the user did not want them traceable
known_solutions.solution: Report files confirmed still present on disk after git rm --cached

known_solutions.problem: The data-qualification-agent repo had been pushed to GitHub with history that the user did not want exposed
known_solutions.solution: Report files (360chi_health_check_report.docx/html/json/md) confirmed still on disk after git rm --cached

decision_log.decision: Replace existing repo with a clean single-commit repo with no prior history
Keep the repo private going forward
Replace existing repo with a fresh repo that has no prior git history
Keep the repo private going forward
